subcodes.first_line: The stone hath cried out in celebration of this wise Remembrance, and every created thing raised its voice when the Dove of the Kingdom called aloud [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد صاحت الحصاه فی ذکر هذا الذکر الحکیم و نادی کلشیء اذ نادت الورقاء الملک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
